title: Meeting calendars and information
summary: This source is a FOMC meeting calendar and navigation page from the Federal Reserve website, listing scheduled Federal Open Market Committee meeting dates from 2021 through 2027 along with associated document links. The page does not contain substantive analysis, discussion of macro catalysts, or market structure content—it is purely an index of meeting dates with links to statements, minutes, and projection materials. This is a container/listing page that should be rejected per archive quality rules.
key_points: FOMC holds eight regularly scheduled meetings per year plus additional meetings as needed
Meeting minutes are released three weeks after each policy decision date
Meetings marked with asterisks (*) include a Summary of Economic Projections
Committee membership changes at the first regularly scheduled meeting of each year
Meeting dates are tentative until confirmed at the preceding meeting
Page provides links to statements, implementation notes, press conference materials, and minutes in PDF and HTML formats

issues_found: Source is a listing/calendar page (listing_page type), not an archiveable research document per Rule 8
No substantive macro catalyst or market structure content present
URL field is blank in metadata, violating source attribution requirement
Source name field is blank despite source body identifying Federal Reserve as origin
Page contains only dates, times, and links to documents—no analysis, no factual claims suitable for independent verification
Low-quality container page with no direct, specific facts worth preserving in a research archive
Publishing date field is blank, reducing source reliability for historical reference

notes: NON-ARCHIVEABLE SOURCE: This is a Federal Reserve FOMC meeting calendar page containing only a list of scheduled meeting dates and links to documents (2021-2027). The page is a navigation/index type, not a research document. No macro catalyst content, no market structure content, and no substantive analysis is present. This source does not meet the threshold for inclusion in a finance research archive. The source name and URL are blank in metadata, making proper attribution impossible.
